narrative.description: XCOM: Enemy Unknown is a turn-based tactics game about squad management, cover positioning, and permadeath tension against an alien invasion.
narrative.core_loop: Manage base and research on the geoscape, deploy squads on tactical grids, use cover and abilities, and preserve veterans across missions.

mechanics.map_notes: In XCOM: Enemy Unknown, units move on a discrete grid with action points, facing, and terrain modifiers.
mechanics.expression: In XCOM: Enemy Unknown, units move on a discrete grid with action points, facing, and terrain modifiers.

mechanics.map_notes: In XCOM: Enemy Unknown, battles resolve in turns with a party of characters selecting commands from menus.
mechanics.expression: In XCOM: Enemy Unknown, battles resolve in turns with a party of characters selecting commands from menus.

mechanics.map_notes: In XCOM: Enemy Unknown, units gain defensive bonuses from terrain cover and flanking angles on a tactical grid.
mechanics.expression: In XCOM: Enemy Unknown, units gain defensive bonuses from terrain cover and flanking angles on a tactical grid.

mechanics.map_notes: In XCOM: Enemy Unknown, fallen party members are permanently removed from the campaign roster.
mechanics.expression: In XCOM: Enemy Unknown, fallen party members are permanently removed from the campaign roster.

mechanics.map_notes: In XCOM: Enemy Unknown, defeating enemies or completing objectives grants experience that increases character stats such as HP, attack, or defense.
mechanics.expression: In XCOM: Enemy Unknown, defeating enemies or completing objectives grants experience that increases character stats such as HP, attack, or defense.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience XCOM: Enemy Unknown through its core strategy loop.
